creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
I've made a patch which updates postsrsd to new version. I've tested this patch with poudriere. You can check the logfile at http://uld.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/10x64-testing/2017-02-27_11h12m20s/logs/postsrsd-1.3_2.log

So I hope this patch will be applied quickly :-)))
